condition.description: Defines a condition for the IAM policy binding, specifying attributes and logic that determine when the binding is applied.

member.description: Specifies the identity to be granted the role, such as a user, group, service account, or domain. Ref: https://cloud.google.com/billing/docs/reference/rest/v1/Policy#Binding

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned to the member. Must be in the format `roles/{role_name}`.
